Defendant Unity Technologies' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings [Part 2 Of 2 For Long Tentative]
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Defendant Unity Technologies' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings [Part 2 Of 2 For Long Tentative] is off calendar as a duplicative entry. (302/EPS)

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. NOAH D. LEBOWITZ, ESQ. of The Law Office of Noah D. Lebowitz (Tel: 510-883-3977) appearing for plaintiff Anne Evans;
Atty. LYNNE HERMLE, ESQ. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (Tel: 650-614-7422) appearing for defendant Unity Technologies

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT UNITY TECHNOLOGIES' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

The Court makes a disclosure re: attorney Noah Lebowitz and his volunteer service as a judge pro tem for this court.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
